projects.name: Real Estate CRM Platform
projects.challenge: A leading property developer needed to manage 5000+ leads across multiple channels with manual processes
projects.solution: Built AI-powered CRM with automated lead scoring, WhatsApp integration, and intelligent follow-up workflows
projects.results: Lead conversion improved by 45% • Response time reduced from 24h to 5 minutes • Revenue increased by $2.3M

projects.name: FinTech Compliance Automation
projects.challenge: Manual compliance checks, KYC verification bottlenecks, and regulatory documentation processes slowing operations
projects.solution: Developed AI agents for automated KYC, real-time compliance monitoring, and intelligent document processing
projects.results: Processing time reduced by 65% • 99.95% compliance accuracy • Onboarded 10000+ customers monthly

projects.name: E-Commerce AI Personalization Engine
projects.challenge: Generic product recommendations, high cart abandonment rate, and poor customer retention metrics
projects.solution: Created ML-powered recommendation engine with behavioral analytics and AI-driven personalization layer
projects.results: Cart abandonment dropped 35% • AOV increased by 48% • Customer retention up 52%

projects.name: Creative Agency Workflow Automation
projects.challenge: Manual project coordination, repetitive task management, and inefficient resource allocation across teams
projects.solution: Built comprehensive workflow automation system with AI task assignment and intelligent resource planning
projects.results: Project delivery speed 4x faster • Team capacity increased 60% • Client satisfaction 9.8/10

projects.name: Enterprise Data Integration Platform
projects.challenge: Disparate legacy systems, poor data visibility, and inefficient inter-departmental workflows
projects.solution: Engineered unified data platform with AI-driven insights and intelligent process orchestration
projects.results: 30% operational efficiency gain • $4.2M annual savings • Real-time insights across 15 departments

about.heading: About AtoZ SolTech
about.mission: Empowering enterprises with future-oriented solutions where AI-powered automation and agile digital strategies drive transformative success
about.vision: To be the trusted partner bridging the gap between traditional legacy systems and cutting-edge AI-driven solutions
about.story: With a wealth of experience and strong track record as Certified Technology Specialists from IIT and IIM, AtoZ SolTech brings 10+ years of expertise in digital transformation. We specialize in helping organizations seamlessly transition from legacy systems to AI-powered enterprises that are future-ready, competitive, and innovative.
